why.title: Unmatched trading conditions
why.c1text: Funds processed in seconds, not days. Available 24/7 via bank transfer, e-wallet, or crypto. No withdrawal fees ever.
why.c2text: XAUUSD spread from 0.3 pip. EUR/USD from 0.3 pip. Zero spread accounts available. No requotes, no slippage.
why.c3text: Regulated by FCA, CySEC, FSCA and 3 more. Segregated client funds. Negative balance protection on all accounts.
why.c4text: Customisable leverage from 1:1 to 1:2000 on selected instruments. Adjust to your risk tolerance at any time.
why.c5text: Support in 14 languages via live chat, phone, and email. Average response time under 30 seconds on live chat.
why.c6text: Full-featured iOS and Android app. Also available on MT4, MT5, and Exness Web Terminal. Seamless cross-device sync.

steps.title: 3 steps to start trading
steps.sub: From registration to live trading in under 10 minutes. No experience needed.

steps.s3text: Fund from $10 via bank, e-wallet, or crypto. Open your first trade immediately.

testimonials1.t3text: "Swap-free accounts and Arabic interface makes Exness perfect for traders in the Middle East. The mobile app is fast and reliable — I trade from anywhere."
testimonials1.t4text: "Been trading for 5 years across many platforms. Exness has the best execution speed I've experienced. Spreads on gold are genuinely unbeatable, especially during Asian session."

quiz.resultTitle: Our recommendation based on your profile
quiz.resultText: Based on your answers, Exness is the best match. It offers the tightest XAUUSD spread (0.3 pip), instant withdrawals processed in under 3 seconds, and leverage up to 1:2000 — all with a $10 minimum deposit. 87% of traders with your profile choose Exness.

expert.title: Expert Assessment
expert.text1: When looking for a broker that combines innovation, reliability, and trader-centric features, Exness stands out as an exceptional choice. With an emphasis on transparency and user-friendliness, Exness caters to traders at every level.
expert.text2: Exness is ideal for both new and experienced traders, offering advanced tools and competitive spreads. The absence of commissions further enhances value.
expert.verdictText: Best for traders who prioritise tight spreads, instant withdrawals, and flexible leverage. Not ideal for those seeking structured education or welcome bonuses.

trust.title: Trust and Safety
trust.text1: Exness operates as a regulated broker, ensuring a secure trading environment. The broker maintains segregated accounts, keeping client funds separate from operational funds.
trust.text2: Exness enforces strict AML and KYC procedures to verify client identities and prevent illegal activities.
trust.segregatedText: Client funds are always kept separate from the broker's operational funds — your money is protected at all times.

conclusion.title: Conclusion
conclusion.text1: Exness is a reliable and innovative broker that offers a comprehensive trading experience. With competitive spreads, multiple account types, and robust regulation, it is a strong choice for traders at all levels.
conclusion.text2: The platform's emphasis on security, transparency, and user experience makes it one of the most trusted brokers in the industry.
conclusion.ctaTitle: Start trading with one of the most trusted brokers

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is Exness safe to trade with?
faq.a1: Yes. Exness is regulated by 6 major financial authorities including the FCA (UK) and CySEC (EU). Client funds are held in segregated accounts separate from company funds. The broker has operated since 2008 with no major regulatory incidents.
faq.a2: The minimum deposit depends on the account type. Standard and Standard Cent accounts have no minimum deposit requirement. Pro accounts require a minimum deposit, while Zero and Raw Spread accounts may vary by region. However, most traders start with as little as $10.
faq.a3: No. Exness does not charge any withdrawal fees. Most withdrawals are processed instantly — typically within seconds. Exness uses market conversion rates at the time of exchange, with no hidden markup.
faq.a4: Exness offers MetaTrader 4 (MT4), MetaTrader 5 (MT5), the web-based Exness Terminal, and the Exness Trade mobile app for iOS and Android. MT5 is the most advanced option with more instruments and order types.
faq.a5: Yes. Exness offers free demo accounts with virtual funds, available on all platforms. Demo accounts are unlimited in duration and allow traders to practice strategies without risk before trading with real money.

disclaimer.1: At Exness, over 98% of withdrawals are processed automatically. 'Fastest withdrawals' refers to a comparison of Exness' withdrawal processing time vs. 3 other brokers, last updated on 07.05.2025. Processing times may vary depending on the chosen payment method.
disclaimer.2: Most precise claims refer to average slippage rates on pending orders based on data collected between September 2024 - July 2025 for XAUUSD, USOIL and BTC CFDs on Exness Standard account vs similar accounts in 4 other brokers. Delays and slippage may occur. No guarantee of execution speed or precision is provided.
disclaimer.3: Spreads may fluctuate and widen due to factors including market volatility, news releases, economic events, when markets open or close, and the type of instruments being traded.
